## NDA Summary — Governing Law & Confidentiality Term

| Document | Governing Law | Confidentiality Term |
|---|---|---|
| `nda-alpha-systems.txt` | State of Delaware (p. 1, §4) | 3 years from the Effective Date (p. 1, §3) |
| `nda-beta-logistics.txt` | State of California (p. 1, §4) | 2 years from the Effective Date (p. 1, §3) |
| `nda-delta-marine.txt` | England and Wales (p. 1, §4) | 18 months from the Effective Date (p. 1, §3) |
| `nda-gamma-labs.txt` | State of New York (p. 1, §4) | 5 years from the Effective Date (p. 1, §3) |

All four NDAs include the same trade-secret carve-out: trade-secret protections survive the stated term and continue for as long as the information qualifies as a trade secret under applicable law.

steps.summary:
{"description": "Read the matter document "nda-alpha-systems.txt" in full using read_document. Extract two facts:

(a) Governing law — identify the jurisdiction whose law governs the agreement (e.g., "State of California", "New York", "Delaware", "England and Wales", etc.). Quote the exact clause and note the page.

(b) Confidentiality term length — identify how long the confidentiality obligations last (e.g., "2 years from the Effective Date", "5 years", "perpetual", "survives indefinitely", etc.). Quote the exact clause and note the page.

If either fact is not stated in the document, say "not stated" for that field — do not infer. Do not invent text.

Return your result as a short structured report with two labeled fields (governing_law, confidentiality_term), each containing the quoted text, the page number, and a one-line plain-English summary. Keep the response focused on this one document only.", "subagent_type": "general-purpose"}

steps.name: read_document
steps.summary:
[nda-alpha-systems.txt (1 pages) — full text]

MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement is entered into between Northwind
Customer GmbH and Alpha Systems Inc. (together, the "Parties").

1. PURPOSE. The Parties wish to explore a potential commercial
relationship and will exchange Confidential Information for that
purpose only.

2. OBLIGATIONS. Each Party shall hold the other Party's Confidential
Information in strict confidence, use it solely for the Purpose, and
disclose it only to representatives with a need to know who are bound
by obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.

3. TERM. The obligations in this Agreement run for three (3) years from the
Effective Date, except trade secrets, which remain protected for as
long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.

4. GOVERNING LAW. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
